Protocol","details":"## Overview The PrimeBroker is the core account primitive in RLD. Each user who wants to borrow against collateral deploys their own PrimeBroker instance. The broker: 1. **Holds Assets** - Cash (collateral token), wRLP tokens, V4 LP positions, TWAMM orders 2. **Reports Value** - `getNetAccountValue()` calculates total asset value for solvency checks 3. **Enables Actions** - Generic `execute()` allows any DeFi interaction with solvency safety 4. **Supports Liquidation** - `seize()` extracts assets during liquidation with proper routing ## Architecture ``` \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502                           USER (EOA)                                     \u2502 \u2502                               \u2502                                          \u2502 \u2502                   Owns NFT at PrimeBrokerFactory                        \u2502 \u2502                    (tokenId = brokerAddress)                             \u2502 \u2502                               \u2502                                          \u2502 \u2502                               \u25bc                                          \u2502 \u2502  \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502                       PrimeBroker                                \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502                                                                  \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502  \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510  \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510  \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510  \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510        \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502  \u2502   Cash   \u2502  \u2502   wRLP   \u2502  \u2502  V4 LP   \u2502  \u2502  TWAMM   \u2502        \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502  \u2502(ERC20 bal)\u2502  \u2502(ERC20 bal)\u2502  \u2502(tokenId) \u2502  \u2502(orderInfo)\u2502        \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502  \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518  \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518  \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518  \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518        \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502                                                                  \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502  getNetAccountValue() \u2192 Sum of all asset values                 \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502  execute(target, data) \u2192 Any DeFi call + solvency check         \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2502  seize(amount, recipient) \u2192 Liquidation asset extraction        \u2502    \u2502 \u2502  \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518    \u2502 \u2502                               \u2502                                          \u2502 \u2502                               \u25bc                                          \u2502 \u2502                    RLDCore (Solvency Checks)                           \u2502 \u2502                               \u2502                                          \u2502 \u2502              isSolvent(broker) = value >= debt \u00d7 ratio                  \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 ``` ## Ownership Model Ownership is determined by an ERC721 NFT in the PrimeBrokerFactory: - tokenId = uint256(uint160(brokerAddress)) - Whoever holds the NFT is the owner - Transferring the NFT transfers account ownership - Enables account trading on secondary markets (OpenSea, etc.) ## V1 Limitations - Only **one** V4 LP position can be tracked at a time - Only **one** TWAMM order can be tracked at a time - Users must manually track their largest positions for accurate solvency ## Security Invariants 1. Every state-changing action ends with a solvency check 2. Only Core can call seize() (liquidation only) 3. Only owner can modify the operator set 4. Operators and owner share the same permissions except operator management","kind":"dev","methods":{"clearActiveTwammOrder()":{"details":"Convenience function for after an order is fully executed or cancelled"},"clearActiveV4Position()":{"details":"Convenience function equivalent to setActiveV4Position(0) Use after selling/closing your V4 position"},"constructor":{"details":"This is the IMPLEMENTATION that clones will delegate to The constructor locks the implementation to prevent direct use","params":{"_core":"RLDCore singleton address - the protocol's central contract","_posm":"Universal V4 Position Manager for NFT ownership checks","_twammModule":"IValuationModule for TWAMM order valuation","_v4Module":"IValuationModule for Uniswap V4 LP position valuation"}},"execute(address,bytes)":{"details":"RESTRICTED: Cannot call collateral/debt/underlying tokens directly.  Use executeWithApproval() for token interactions.","params":{"data":"The encoded function call data","target":"The contract address to call"}},"executeWithApproval(address,bytes,address,uint256)":{"details":"SAFE REPLACEMENT for raw execute(). Grants approval only for the duration of the call.","params":{"approvalAmount":"The amount to approve","approvalToken":"The token to approve (optional, pass address(0) to skip)","data":"The data to execute","target":"The contract to call"}},"getNetAccountValue()":{"details":"Called by RLDCore.isSolvent() to determine if broker meets margin requirements ## Value Components (in order of priority) 1. **Cash Balance** - Direct collateralToken balance (e.g., aUSDC) 2. **wRLP Tokens** - Position tokens valued at indexPrice (wRLP \u00d7 price) 3. **TWAMM Order** - Delegated to TWAMM_MODULE.getValue() 4. **V4 LP Position** - Delegated to V4_MODULE.getValue() ## Value Formula ``` totalValue = collateralBalance             + (wRLPBalance \u00d7 indexPrice)            + twammModule.getValue(orderData)            + v4Module.getValue(positionData) ``` ## V1 Limitations - Only ONE V4 LP position is counted (activeTokenId) - Only ONE TWAMM order is counted (activeTwammOrder) - User must track their LARGEST position to avoid false insolvency","returns":{"totalValue":"The total asset value in collateral token terms (e.g., USDC)"}},"initialize(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Called by PrimeBrokerFactory immediately after clone deployment This function: 1. Sets the market ID this broker will operate in 2. Sets the factory address for ownership lookups 3. Caches market addresses from Core to save gas on future calls Gas Optimization: We cache token addresses because getNetAccountValue() is called on EVERY solvency check. Avoiding Core calls saves ~2600 gas per check.","params":{"_factory":"The PrimeBrokerFactory that deployed this clone","_marketId":"The market ID this broker is bound to"}},"lockAcquired(bytes)":{"details":"Called by Core.lock() - DO NOT call directly This function: 1. Decodes the operation parameters 2. Calls Core.modifyPosition() to update the position 3. Approves Core to pull collateral (if depositing)","params":{"data":"Encoded (MarketId, deltaCollateral, deltaDebt)"},"returns":{"_0":"Empty bytes (required by interface)"}},"modifyPosition(bytes32,int256,int256)":{"details":"Uses the flash-loan-style \"lock\" pattern for safe accounting ## Lock Pattern ``` modifyPosition() \u2192 Core.lock(data) \u2192 broker.lockAcquired(data) \u2192 Core.modifyPosition()                            \u2502                                              \u2502                            \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 callback \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 ``` The lock pattern ensures atomic execution and proper accounting: 1. Broker calls Core.lock(encodedData) 2. Core sets broker as lock holder 3. Core calls back to broker.lockAcquired(data) 4. Broker decodes data and calls Core.modifyPosition() 5. Core validates solvency and settles balances","params":{"deltaCollateral":"Collateral change (+deposit, -withdraw)","deltaDebt":"Debt change (+borrow, -repay)","rawMarketId":"The market ID (must match this broker's market)"}},"multicall(bytes[])":{"details":"Allows \"looping\" (e.g., Deposit -> Borrow -> Swap -> Deposit)","params":{"data":"An array of encoded function calls to this contract"},"returns":{"results":"An array of return data from each call"}},"seize(uint256,address)":{"details":"Called ONLY by RLDCore.liquidate() when broker is underwater ## Two-Phase Seize Model Assets are routed differently based on type: - **collateralToken** \u2192 recipient (liquidator receives as bonus) - **positionToken (wRLP)** \u2192 Core (burned to offset debt) - **Other tokens** \u2192 Stay in broker (not relevant to liquidation) This enables \"swap-free\" liquidation where existing wRLP in the broker directly offsets debt without requiring the liquidator to source wRLP. ## Priority Order 1. **Cash** - Collateral token balance (fastest, simplest) 2. **TWAMM Order** - Cancel order, recover refund + earnings 3. **V4 LP Position** - Delegate to V4_MODULE.seize() ## Example Flow ``` Broker has: 5000 USDC (cash) + TWAMM order worth 3000 USDC Debt to cover: 7000 wRLP worth Seize amount (with bonus): 8000 USDC equivalent 1. Seize all 5000 USDC cash \u2192 liquidator (collateralSeized = 5000) 2. Cancel TWAMM, recover 3000 value:    - If tokens are USDC \u2192 liquidator (collateralSeized += 3000)    - If tokens are wRLP \u2192 Core (wRLPExtracted += amount) 3. Return SeizeOutput{collateralSeized: X, wRLPExtracted: Y} ```"},"setActiveTwammOrder(((address,address,uint24,int24,address),(address,uint160,bool),bytes32))":{"details":"V1 LIMITATION: Only ONE order can be tracked at a time ## Order Verification If orderId != bytes32(0), the function verifies: 1. The order exists (sellRate > 0) 2. This broker owns the order (orderKey.owner == address(this)) ## Important: Hook vs Module - info.key.hooks = The actual TWAMM hook contract - TWAMM_MODULE = The valuation module (different contract!) The order is stored in the hook, so we call hook.getOrder() for verification.","params":{"info":"The TWAMM order info to track (pass empty orderId to clear)"}},"setActiveV4Position(uint256)":{"details":"V1 LIMITATION: Only ONE position can be tracked at a time ## Ownership Verification If newTokenId != 0, the function verifies that this broker owns the NFT by calling POSM.ownerOf(newTokenId). This prevents tracking positions that belong to other accounts. ## Solvency Check A solvency check is performed AFTER updating the tracking. This prevents users from \"gaming\" the system by switching to smaller positions: - If switching from 100k position to 1k position would make broker insolvent - The transaction reverts with \"Insolvent after update\"","params":{"newTokenId":"The NFT token ID to track (0 to clear/untrack)"}},"setOperator(address,bool)":{"details":"ONLY the owner (NFT holder) can manage operators Operators can perform all actions EXCEPT managing other operators ## Use Cases - Add a trading bot: setOperator(botAddress, true) - Add a multisig signer: setOperator(signerAddress, true)   - Revoke access: setOperator(address, false) ## Security - Operators persist through ownership transfers (NFT transfer) - New owner can remove old operators - Operators cannot add other operators","params":{"active":"True to grant, false to revoke","operator":"The address to grant/revoke operator status"}}},"stateVariables":{"CORE":{"details":"Set in implementation constructor, shared by all clones Used for: solvency checks, position modifications, lock pattern"},"POSM":{"details":"The Uniswap V4 contract that mints LP position NFTs"},"TWAMM_MODULE":{"details":"Implements IValuationModule - getValue() for TWAMM orders WARNING: This is the VALUATION module, not the TWAMM hook itself"},"V4_MODULE":{"details":"Implements IValuationModule - getValue() for V4 positions"},"activeTokenId":{"details":"0 = no position tracked V1 limitation: Only ONE position can be tracked for solvency If user has multiple positions, they should track the largest one"},"activeTwammOrder":{"details":"orderId = bytes32(0) means no order tracked V1 limitation: Only ONE order can be tracked for solvency"},"collateralToken":{"details":"Copied from Core.MarketAddresses during initialization Used in: getNetAccountValue(), seize(), modifyPosition()"},"factory":{"details":"Used for NFT-based ownership lookup: factory.ownerOf(tokenId)"},"initialized":{"details":"Prevents re-initialization of clones Set to true in implementation constructor AND after clone initialization"},"marketId":{"details":"Each broker is bound to exactly one market at initialization"},"operators":{"details":"Operators can do everything EXCEPT modify the operator set Use case: Keeper bots, automation contracts, multisig signers"},"positionToken":{"details":"ERC20 representing synthetic debt; can be held as collateral Value = balance \u00d7 indexPrice"},"rateOracle":{"details":"Implements both IRLDOracle and ISpotOracle interfaces"},"underlyingPool":{"details":"Passed to oracle.getIndexPrice(underlyingPool, collateralToken)"},"underlyingToken":{"details":"Copied from Core.MarketAddresses during initialization"}},"title":"Prime Broker V1 - Smart Margin Account","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"Execute(address,bytes)":{"notice":"Emitted when a generic execution is performed."},"OperatorUpdated(address,bool)":{"notice":"Emitted when an operator is updated."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"CORE()":{"notice":"The RLDCore singleton contract address"},"POSM()":{"notice":"Universal V4 Position Manager (POSM) for NFT ownership checks"},"TWAMM_MODULE()":{"notice":"The module for valuing TWAMM orders"},"V4_MODULE()":{"notice":"The module for valuing V4 LP positions"},"activeTokenId()":{"notice":"The currently tracked Uniswap V4 LP position NFT ID"},"activeTwammOrder()":{"notice":"The currently tracked TWAMM order"},"clearActiveTwammOrder()":{"notice":"Clears the tracked TWAMM order"},"clearActiveV4Position()":{"notice":"Clears the tracked V4 LP position"},"collateralToken()":{"notice":"The quote token (e.g., USDC) - cached for gas savings"},"constructor":{"notice":"Deploys the PrimeBroker implementation contract"},"execute(address,bytes)":{"notice":"Executes an arbitrary call to an external contract"},"executeWithApproval(address,bytes,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Executes a call with a Just-In-Time (JIT) approval"},"factory()":{"notice":"The PrimeBrokerFactory that deployed this broker"},"getNetAccountValue()":{"notice":"Calculates the total value of all assets held by this broker"},"initialize(bytes32,address)":{"notice":"Initializes a cloned PrimeBroker instance"},"lockAcquired(bytes)":{"notice":"Callback from Core during the lock pattern"},"marketId()":{"notice":"Which market this broker operates in"},"modifyPosition(bytes32,int256,int256)":{"notice":"Modifies the broker's debt position in RLDCore"},"multicall(bytes[])":{"notice":"Executes a batch of calls in a single transaction"},"operators(address)":{"notice":"Addresses authorized to act on behalf of the owner"},"positionToken()":{"notice":"The wRLP (Wrapped Rate LP) token for this market"},"rateOracle()":{"notice":"Price oracle for index and spot prices"},"seize(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Extracts assets from the broker during liquidation"},"setActiveTwammOrder(((address,address,uint24,int24,address),(address,uint160,bool),bytes32))":{"notice":"Sets which TWAMM order is tracked for solvency calculations"},"setActiveV4Position(uint256)":{"notice":"Sets which V4 LP position is tracked for solvency calculations"},"setOperator(address,bool)":{"notice":"Adds or removes an operator for this broker"},"underlyingPool()":{"notice":"Pool identifier for oracle price lookups"},"underlyingToken()":{"notice":"The base token (e.g., wETH) - cached for gas savings"}},"notice":"A user-owned smart contract that serves as a \"smart margin account\" for the RLD Protocol.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/src/rld/broker/PrimeBroker.sol":"PrimeBroker"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@uniswap/v4-core/=contracts/lib/v4-core/",":ds-test/=contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":forge-std/=contracts/lib/forge-std/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=contracts/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":permit2/=contracts/lib/permit2/",":solady/=contracts/lib/solady/src/",":solmate/=contracts/lib/solmate/",":v4-core/=contracts/lib/v4-core/",":v4-periphery/=contracts/lib/v4-periphery/"]},"sources":{"contracts/lib/permit2/src/interfaces/IAllowanceTransfer.sol":{"keccak256":"0x37f0ac203b6ef605c9533e1a739477e8e9dcea90710b40e645a367f8a21ace29","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://e0104d72aeaec1cd66cc232e7de7b7ead08608efcc179491b8a66387614670b0","dweb:/ipfs/QmfAZDyuNC9FXXbnJUwqHNwmAK6uRrXxtWEytLsxjskPsN"]},"contracts/lib/permit2/src/interfaces/IEIP712.sol":{"keccak256":"0xfdccf2b9639070803cd0e4198427fb0df3cc452ca59bd3b8a0d957a9a4254138","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f7c936ac42ce89e827db905a1544397f8bdf46db34cdb6aa1b90dea42fdb4c72","dweb:/ipfs/QmVgurxo1N31qZqkPBirw9Z7S9tLYmv6jSwQp8R8ur2cBk"]},"contracts/lib/solmate/src/tokens/ERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcdfd8db76b2a3415620e4d18cc5545f3d50de792dbf2c3dd5adb40cbe6f94b10","license":"AGPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://57b3ab70cde374af1cf2c9888636e8de6cf660f087b1c9abd805e9271e19fa35","dweb:/ipfs/QmNrLDBAHYFjpjSd12jerm1AdBkDqEYUUaXgnT854BUZ97"]},"contracts/lib/solmate/src/utils/FixedPointMathLib.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1b62af9baf5b8e991ed7531bc87f45550ba9d61e8dbff5caf237ccaf3a3fd843","license":"AGPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://b7b38b977c5305b18ceefbeed4c9ceaaaefa419b520de62de6604ea661f8c0a9","dweb:/ipfs/QmecMRzgfMyDVa2pvBqMMDLYBappaj7Aa3qcMoQYEQrhWi"]},"contracts/lib/solmate/src/utils/SafeTransferLib.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2725cc1d6f78a6aba23f6b5421f064dea9dfdadeb4689bf987f8962d62383746","l clearActiveTwammOrder().details: Convenience function for after an order is fully executed or cancelled

clearActiveV4Position().details: Convenience function equivalent to setActiveV4Position(0) Use after selling/closing your V4 position

constructor.details: This is the IMPLEMENTATION that clones will delegate to The constructor locks the implementation to prevent direct use

params._core: RLDCore singleton address - the protocol's central contract
params._posm: Universal V4 Position Manager for NFT ownership checks
params._v4Module: IValuationModule for Uniswap V4 LP position valuation

execute(address,bytes).details: RESTRICTED: Cannot call collateral/debt/underlying tokens directly.  Use executeWithApproval() for token interactions.

executeWithApproval(address,bytes,addres.details: SAFE REPLACEMENT for raw execute(). Grants approval only for the duration of the call.

params.approvalToken: The token to approve (optional, pass address(0) to skip)

getNetAccountValue().details: Called by RLDCore.isSolvent() to determine if broker meets margin requirements ## Value Components (in order of priority) 1. **Cash Balance** - Direct collateralToken balance (e.g., aUSDC) 2. **wRLP Tokens** - Position tokens valued at indexPrice (wRLP × price) 3. **TWAMM Order** - Delegated to TWAMM_MODULE.getValue() 4. **V4 LP Position** - Delegated to V4_MODULE.getValue() ## Value Formula ``` totalValue = collateralBalance             + (wRLPBalance × indexPrice)            + twammModule.getValue(orderData)            + v4Module.getValue(positionData) ``` ## V1 Limitations - Only ONE V4 LP position is counted (activeTokenId) - Only ONE TWAMM order is counted (activeTwammOrder) - User must track their LARGEST position to avoid false insolvency

returns.totalValue: The total asset value in collateral token terms (e.g., USDC)

initialize(bytes32,address).details: Called by PrimeBrokerFactory immediately after clone deployment This function: 1. Sets the market ID this broker will operate in 2. Sets the factory address for ownership lookups 3. Caches market addresses from Core to save gas on future calls Gas Optimization: We cache token addresses because getNetAccountValue() is called on EVERY solvency check. Avoiding Core calls saves ~2600 gas per check.

params._factory: The PrimeBrokerFactory that deployed this clone
params._marketId: The market ID this broker is bound to

lockAcquired(bytes).details: Called by Core.lock() - DO NOT call directly This function: 1. Decodes the operation parameters 2. Calls Core.modifyPosition() to update the position 3. Approves Core to pull collateral (if depositing)

modifyPosition(bytes32,int256,int256).details: Uses the flash-loan-style "lock" pattern for safe accounting ## Lock Pattern ``` modifyPosition() → Core.lock(data) → broker.lockAcquired(data) → Core.modifyPosition()                            │                                              │                            └──────────── callback ────────────────────────┘ ``` The lock pattern ensures atomic execution and proper accounting: 1. Broker calls Core.lock(encodedData) 2. Core sets broker as lock holder 3. Core calls back to broker.lockAcquired(data) 4. Broker decodes data and calls Core.modifyPosition() 5. Core validates solvency and settles balances

params.rawMarketId: The market ID (must match this broker's market)

params.data: An array of encoded function calls to this contract

returns.results: An array of return data from each call

seize(uint256,address).details: Called ONLY by RLDCore.liquidate() when broker is underwater ## Two-Phase Seize Model Assets are routed differently based on type: - **collateralToken** → recipient (liquidator receives as bonus) - **positionToken (wRLP)** → Core (burned to offset debt) - **Other tokens** → Stay in broker (not relevant to liquidation) This enables "swap-free" liquidation where existing wRLP in the broker directly offsets debt without requiring the liquidator to source wRLP. ## Priority Order 1. **Cash** - Collateral token balance (fastest, simplest) 2. **TWAMM Order** - Cancel order, recover refund + earnings 3. **V4 LP Position** - Delegate to V4_MODULE.seize() ## Example Flow ``` Broker has: 5000 USDC (cash) + TWAMM order worth 3000 USDC Debt to cover: 7000 wRLP worth Seize amount (with bonus): 8000 USDC equivalent 1. Seize all 5000 USDC cash → liquidator (collateralSeized = 5000) 2. Cancel TWAMM, recover 3000 value:    - If tokens are USDC → liquidator (collateralSeized += 3000)    - If tokens are wRLP → Core (wRLPExtracted += amount) 3. Return SeizeOutput{collateralSeized: X, wRLPExtracted: Y} ```

setActiveTwammOrder(((address,address,ui.details: V1 LIMITATION: Only ONE order can be tracked at a time ## Order Verification If orderId != bytes32(0), the function verifies: 1. The order exists (sellRate > 0) 2. This broker owns the order (orderKey.owner == address(this)) ## Important: Hook vs Module - info.key.hooks = The actual TWAMM hook contract - TWAMM_MODULE = The valuation module (different contract!) The order is stored in the hook, so we call hook.getOrder() for verification.

params.info: The TWAMM order info to track (pass empty orderId to clear)

setActiveV4Position(uint256).details: V1 LIMITATION: Only ONE position can be tracked at a time ## Ownership Verification If newTokenId != 0, the function verifies that this broker owns the NFT by calling POSM.ownerOf(newTokenId). This prevents tracking positions that belong to other accounts. ## Solvency Check A solvency check is performed AFTER updating the tracking. This prevents users from "gaming" the system by switching to smaller positions: - If switching from 100k position to 1k position would make broker insolvent - The transaction reverts with "Insolvent after update"

params.newTokenId: The NFT token ID to track (0 to clear/untrack)

setOperator(address,bool).details: ONLY the owner (NFT holder) can manage operators Operators can perform all actions EXCEPT managing other operators ## Use Cases - Add a trading bot: setOperator(botAddress, true) - Add a multisig signer: setOperator(signerAddress, true)   - Revoke access: setOperator(address, false) ## Security - Operators persist through ownership transfers (NFT transfer) - New owner can remove old operators - Operators cannot add other operators

params.active: True to grant, false to revoke
params.operator: The address to grant/revoke operator status

POSM().notice: Universal V4 Position Manager (POSM) for NFT ownership checks

TWAMM_MODULE().notice: The module for valuing TWAMM orders

V4_MODULE().notice: The module for valuing V4 LP positions

activeTokenId().notice: The currently tracked Uniswap V4 LP position NFT ID

clearActiveV4Position().notice: Clears the tracked V4 LP position

collateralToken().notice: The quote token (e.g., USDC) - cached for gas savings

execute(address,bytes).notice: Executes an arbitrary call to an external contract

executeWithApproval(address,bytes,addres.notice: Executes a call with a Just-In-Time (JIT) approval

factory().notice: The PrimeBrokerFactory that deployed this broker

getNetAccountValue().notice: Calculates the total value of all assets held by this broker

lockAcquired(bytes).notice: Callback from Core during the lock pattern

marketId().notice: Which market this broker operates in

modifyPosition(bytes32,int256,int256).notice: Modifies the broker's debt position in RLDCore

multicall(bytes[]).notice: Executes a batch of calls in a single transaction

operators(address).notice: Addresses authorized to act on behalf of the owner

positionToken().notice: The wRLP (Wrapped Rate LP) token for this market

rateOracle().notice: Price oracle for index and spot prices

seize(uint256,address).notice: Extracts assets from the broker during liquidation

setActiveTwammOrder(((address,address,ui.notice: Sets which TWAMM order is tracked for solvency calculations

setActiveV4Position(uint256).notice: Sets which V4 LP position is tracked for solvency calculations

setOperator(address,bool).notice: Adds or removes an operator for this broker

underlyingPool().notice: Pool identifier for oracle price lookups

underlyingToken().notice: The base token (e.g., wETH) - cached for gas savings
